attributes.action: Stop paying France the £476m to stop the migrants crossing the channel.
attributes.additional_details: The French police are allowing the migrants to leave French shores and offering no resistance, stopping the payments will send a clear message to Macron that we expect results.
attributes.background: Refuse to pay the French the money that isn’t being used to stop the migrants. They are reneging on the agreement.

rejection.details:
You already have a petition open on this:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/760177
